max_resolution.external: External display is 640 x 480 with 16 colors, Simultaneous LCD and CRT

display_options: 9.5" STN Transflective VGA 640 x 480 monochrome, 16 grey scales, 3 to 1 contrast ratio
touch: Electromagnetic pen/digitizer/stylus, untethered, batteryless, realistic pen-to-paper feel
pen: Untethered batteryless stylus stored in compartment on bottom

storage.hdd: 105 MB PCMCIA Type III, 12 ms, 4500 rpm, 16 MB/sec burst transfer rate (Model B0F preinstalled); Uses a specific Type III PCMCIA slot

Battery.capacity: Two batteries ship standard / can use one or two batteries
Battery.form: 1 battery: 1.65 to 5 hours; 2 battery: 3.3 to 10 hours

ports: Port Replicator (ships standard) includes: 15 pin external CRT port, 9 pin 16550A serial port, 25 pin EPP parallel port, diskette drive connector, keyboard port, DC port for AC connector

PCMCIA slots: 3 Type II or 2 Type III: 1st slot: 2 Type II or 1 Type III (any additional memory must go into this slot; adding IC DRAM memory will leave 1 Type II slot remaining); 2nd slot: 2 Type II or 1 Type III (260 MB PCMCIA disk in Model B0F is installed here)
keyboard: No physical keyboard (uses electromagnetic pen/stylus for input; external IBM keyboard supported via Port Replicator)
system: OS/2 Warp with Pen for OS/2 1.03
Windows for Pen Computing 1.0 with IBM DOS 7.0/Windows 3.11
